title: IMF clears $1.32 billion for Pakistan after review, signals continued support under $7 billion reform programme
content:
The IMF has cleared a $1.32 billion disbursement for Pakistan.
*   This approval comes after a review and is part of a larger $7 billion reform programme.
*   The decision signals the IMF's continued support for Pakistan.

title: Mount Dukono erupts: Indonesia says 3 hikers killed, 3 others missing as volcano spews ash 10 km into sky — watch
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Mount Dukono in Indonesia has erupted.
*   The eruption tragically killed three hikers, with three others currently missing.
*   The volcano spewed ash 10 kilometers into the sky.

title: Internal mismatches are the major reason behind GST notices: Clear Tax
content:
Clear Tax reports that the main reason businesses are receiving Goods and Services Tax (GST) notices is due to internal mismatches.
*   These "internal mismatches" refer to discrepancies within a company's own records or between their reported data.
*   The finding highlights the critical need for businesses to ensure accuracy and consistency in their internal financial data to avoid compliance issues.

title: Supreme Court asks West Bengal Governor to appoint VCs to three state-aided universities
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The Supreme Court has issued a directive to the West Bengal Governor.
*   The Governor is asked to appoint Vice-Chancellors (VCs).
*   These appointments are specifically for three state-aided universities.

title: Plea in Supreme Court says Governor is ‘duty-bound’ to invite TVK to form government in Tamil Nadu
content:
A plea has been filed in the Supreme Court regarding government formation in Tamil Nadu.
*   The plea argues that the Governor is 'duty-bound' to invite the TVK party.
*   The objective is for the TVK to be invited to form the government in the state.
